questionHtml:
The combustion of glucose is exothermic and occurs according to the following equation:

C6H12O6 (s) + 6O2 (g) → 6CO2 (g) + 6H2O (g)

Which is correct for this reaction?

meta.title: The combustion of glucose is exothermic and occurs according to the following equation: C6H12O6 (s) + 6O2 (g) → 6CO2 (g) + 6H2O (g) Which is correct for this reaction?
